questionHtml: Label with a P on the x-axis the level of commercial sea fishing activity that would result in maximum sustainability.
markschemeHtml:
label P on x-axis below the peak yield;
Dotted line for guidance, not required in answer.

Do not accept if P is only on the curve

meta.title: Label with a P on the x-axis the level of commercial sea fishing activity that would result in maximum sustainability.
